descriptions: Vieux-Doo Dawgs is a support club created by Galloping Goose.

Yiddish Black Hand.description: Criminal organization and extortion ring operating on New York's Lower East Side in the early 20th century, led by Jacob 'Johnny' Levinsky. It targeted Jewish immigrant businessmen, particularly pushcart vendors and ice cream manufacturers, using anonymous threat letters. The group also engaged in assault, theft, and murder for hire.

descriptions: Pápayovci cooperated with Sýkorovci.
edges.evidence_quote: Pápay and his group began to cooperate with Miroslav Sýkor and his group

descriptions: The Outlaws absorbed the Wheelmen Motorcycle Club to form their North Side chapter.
edges.evidence_quote: The North Side chapter was initiated via the absorption of the Wheelmen Motorcycle Club in 1993

edges.evidence_quote: An internal faction of Ahrar al-Sham, known as the Ashidaa Mujahideen Brigade

descriptions: Ashida'a Mujahideen Brigade left Ahrar al-Sham.
edges.evidence_quote: In September 2016, Ashida'a Mujahideen Brigade left Ahrar al-Sham, apparently due to Ahrar's support of Turkey's Operation Euphrates Shield and lack of willingness to be closer to al-Nusra Front.

descriptions: Al-Nusra was allied with Ashida'a Mujahideen Brigade.

Foxtrot (criminal network).description: Foxtrot is a Swedish criminal network that emerged in the late 2010s, primarily involved in narcotics distribution. Led by Rawa Majid, also known as the Kurdish Fox, the network has developed direct operational ties with Iran's Ministry of Intelligence and Security. It is linked to violent crimes including shootings, bombings, and attacks on Israeli and Jewish targets in Europe. The network recruits vulnerable individuals and has been a major concern for Swedish law enforcement.

descriptions: Foxtrot is allied with Bro-network.
edges.evidence_quote: it has been established through numerous investigations that the Foxtrot Network is allied with the Bro-network and Zero Network.

descriptions: Foxtrot commits violent crimes against Dalen Network.
edges.evidence_quote: People hired by the Foxtrot network and Majid have committed several violent crimes against the Dalen Network and their allies.

descriptions: Foxtrot is allied with Zero Network.
edges.evidence_quote: it has been established through numerous investigations that the Foxtrot Network is allied with the Bro-network and Zero Network.

Alfieri clan.description: The Alfieri clan was a Neapolitan Camorra clan operating in the north-east of Naples, with its sphere of influence in Saviano and Nola. Founded by Carmine Alfieri after his father's murder in 1952, the clan became a founding member of the Nuova Famiglia alliance to counter the Nuova Camorra Organizzata. It expanded its power in the 1980s but declined after Carmine Alfieri became a pentito in 1993. The clan is now defunct.

descriptions: Los Cabrera (MZ/MF) clashed with La Linea.

descriptions: The two factions are in open armed conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The event triggered a formal schism within the cartel and escalated into a multi-front war between the MZ/MF faction and Los Chapitos

descriptions: Los Chapitos and MZ/MF faction are in armed conflict.
edges.evidence_quote: The Sinaloa War is an ongoing internal armed conflict within the Sinaloa Cartel, centered in northwestern Mexico. The conflict began on 9 September 2024, following the transfer of Ismael "El Mayo" Zambada to United States authorities by members of the Chapitos faction.

descriptions: La Chapiza (Chapitos) and La Mayiza (MZ/MF) are in conflict.

descriptions: The two factions are engaged in an internal armed conflict within the Sinaloa Cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: The conflict began on 9 September 2024, following the transfer of Ismael 'El Mayo' Zambada to United States authorities by members of the Chapitos faction. The event triggered a formal schism within the cartel and escalated into a multi-front war between the MZ/MF faction and Los Chapitos

descriptions: Los Chapitos and La Mayiza are in internal conflict for control of the cartel.
edges.evidence_quote: actualmente esta en pugna entre las facciones comandadas por Iván Archivaldo Guzmán Salazar ( Los Chapitos ) e Ismael Zambada Sicairos ( La Mayiza )

descriptions: Los Chapitos y La Mayiza son facciones rivales dentro del Cártel de Sinaloa.

descriptions: Los Chapitos están en guerra con la facción de El Mayo (La Mayiza).

Armed clashes were reported in Mocorito and Guamúchil, and the BLO formally aligned with the MZ/MF faction.

edges.evidence_quote: actualmente esta en pugna entre las facciones comandadas por Iván Archivaldo Guzmán Salazar ( Los Chapitos ) e Ismael Zambada Sicairos ( La Mayiza )

Clan Di Cosola.description: Italian criminal organization based in Bari, founded in the 1980s by Antonio Di Cosola. Operates in the Carbonara, Ceglie del Campo, and Loseto neighborhoods. Involved in drug trafficking, extortion, and weapons possession. Weakened after the boss's collaboration with authorities.

descriptions: Di Cosola clan is listed as an ally of Capriati clan in the infobox.

Hai San Secret Society.description: The Hai San Secret Society was a Chinese secret society based in Penang, established around 1820 with origins in Southern China. It was involved in the Larut Wars of 1862–1873, fighting against the Ghee Hin Society for control of tin mines. The society was predominantly Hakka and engaged in bribery, conspiracy, extortion, and mercenary activities. It was dissolved around 1890.

descriptions: Ghee Hin frequently engaged in violent conflict with Hai San.
edges.evidence_quote: The Ghee Hin often fought against the Hakka -dominated Hai San secret society .

descriptions: Hai San and Ghee Hin were rivals, fighting in the Larut Wars.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Ghee Hin Society

descriptions: Hai San was allied with the Tokong society, which financed tin mining.
edges.evidence_quote: The Hai San society was allied with the Penang-based Tokong or Tua Peh Kong society

descriptions: Hai San absorbed the Wah Sang society around 1854.
edges.evidence_quote: Bolton et al. suggest that the Hai San society ... by around 1854 had absorbed the Wah Sang society

'Ndrina Palamara.description: The 'Ndrina Palamara is a 'ndrina (organized crime family) of the 'Ndrangheta based in Africo, Calabria, Italy. It is allied with the Bruzzaniti and Morabito clans. The group has been involved in drug trafficking, particularly cocaine from South America via Senegal, and in the rigging of public contracts in the tourism and hydroelectric sectors. Members have been arrested in multiple operations, including 'Naos' in 2008.

descriptions: Alvaro and Palamara co-owned the Cafè de Paris.

descriptions: Palamara, through Sculli, are active in illegal betting alongside Albanian and Bosnian criminals who support the Emmanuello family.
edges.evidence_quote: A Genova sono stanziati gli alleati Palamara e che tramite il nipote del Morabito Giuseppe Sculli , sono attivi in particolar modo nel totonero insieme a malavitosi albanesi e bosniaci come Safet Altic, spalleggiatori delle famiglie siciliane Fiandaca, Morso, Rinzivillo e Emmanuello di Gela .

descriptions: Palamara, through Sculli, are active in illegal betting alongside Albanian and Bosnian criminals who support the Fiandaca family.

Inagawa-kai.description: The Inagawa-kai is the third largest yakuza group in Japan, based in the Kantō region. Founded in 1949 by Kakuji Inagawa in Atami, Shizuoka, it initially focused on illegal gambling and later expanded into drug trafficking, extortion, and prostitution. It was one of the first yakuza organizations to operate overseas and has an estimated 1,600 members.

descriptions: Inagawa-kai's founder headed the Kanto-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: In the early 1960s, he headed the short-lived Kanto-kai, a federation of Kantō region gangs organized by Yoshio Kodama.

descriptions: The infobox lists the Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi as a rival of Inagawa-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: Rivals: Kobe Yamaguchi-gumi

descriptions: Inagawa-kai is a principal clan of the Yakuza.
edges.evidence_quote: Principal clans: Yamaguchi-gumi, Sumiyoshi-kai, Inagawa-kai

descriptions: The infobox lists the Sixth Yamaguchi-gumi as an ally of Inagawa-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: Allies: The Sixth Yamaguchi-gumi

descriptions: Sumiyoshi-kai and Inagawa-kai are part of a loose alliance among major yakuza syndicates.
edges.evidence_quote: the three major yakuza syndicates have formed a loose alliance, and in April 2023, Kiyoshi Takayama ... Shuji Ogawa ... and Kazuya Uchibori ... held a social gathering.

descriptions: Suzuki-gumi is an affiliate of the Inagawa-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: the Suzuki-gumi, an Inagawa affiliate

descriptions: Toa-kai and Inagawa-kai are fellow members of the Kanto Hatsuka-kai federation.
edges.evidence_quote: The Toa-kai is a member of a bakuto fraternal federation named the Kanto Hatsuka-kai, along with four other Kanto -based yakuza syndicates, the Sumiyoshi-kai , the Inagawa-kai , the Matsuba-kai , and the Soai-kai .

descriptions: Taoka formed an alliance between Yamaguchi-gumi and Inagawa-kai.
edges.evidence_quote: Taoka forged an alliance between the Yamaguchi-gumi and the Inagawa-kai at a sakazuki ceremony at his home.

descriptions: Yamaguchi-gumi and Inagawa-kai are part of a loose alliance among major yakuza syndicates.
edges.evidence_quote: the three major yakuza syndicates have formed a loose alliance, and in April 2023, Kiyoshi Takayama ... Shuji Ogawa ... and Kazuya Uchibori ... held a social gathering.

descriptions: Inagawa-kai is an ally of Yamaguchi-gumi.

Revolutionary Forces of the G9 Family an.description: A federation of 12 armed groups in Haiti led by former police officer Jimmy 'Barbecue' Chérizier, founded in June 2020. It controls over 80% of Port-au-Prince and is involved in extrajudicial massacres, drug trafficking, and political violence. In March 2024, it participated in a jailbreak that led to the resignation of Prime Minister Ariel Henry.

Nutty Blocc Compton Crips.description: The Nutty Blocc Compton Crips are a set of the Crips gang alliance based in Compton, California. They are one of the larger Crip sets in Compton and have been involved in gang wars, notably with the ATF alliance in 1995. Several influential rappers have been associated with the gang.

edges.source: Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine
descriptions: Palestinian Liberation Front merged into PFLP.
edges.evidence_quote: Included within the discussions, as well as the ANM (including the RYO), were Heroes of Return (officially a collaboration with the PLO but actually under ANM control), Ahmed Jibril's Syria-based Palestinian Liberation Front, and a group of Jordanian Nasserists led by the former army officer Ahmed Za'rur. These groups combined to form the Popular Front for the Liberation of Palestine (PFLP) which was announced to the public on 11 December 1967.
